description: AHA 2025 Adult Cardiac Arrest Algorithm — VF / pVT / Asystole / PEA

thresholds._comment: All timing values in seconds unless noted. Modify only under medical director review.

rules.deviation_message: CPR not initiated within 30 seconds of arrest recognition
rules.recommendation: Begin chest compressions immediately upon recognizing cardiac arrest.

rules.deviation_message: Shock not delivered within 35 seconds of VF/pVT detection
rules.recommendation: Charge the defibrillator during CPR and deliver shock as soon as charged and rhythm confirmed.

rules.deviation_message: CPR not resumed within 10 seconds after shock delivery
rules.recommendation: Resume compressions immediately after shock — do not wait for rhythm analysis.

rules.deviation_message: First epinephrine delayed beyond 10 minutes of arrest recognition
rules.recommendation: Administer epinephrine 1 mg IV/IO — as early as possible in non-shockable, or after 2nd/3rd shock in shockable rhythms.

rules.deviation_message: Rhythm check interval exceeded 2 minutes (plus 15 second grace)
rules.recommendation: Perform rhythm checks every 2 minutes as part of the standard CPR cycle.

rules.deviation_message: Epinephrine repeat dose given less than 3 minutes after previous dose
rules.recommendation: Repeat epinephrine every 3-5 minutes. More frequent dosing does not improve outcome.
Repeat epinephrine every 3-5 minutes. Intervals over 5 minutes represent under-treatment.

rules.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Shockable Rhythm Epi Timing
rules.deviation_message: Epinephrine given before any defibrillation attempt in shockable rhythm (VF/pVT)
rules.recommendation: In VF/pVT: deliver shocks first. Epinephrine is given after the 2nd or 3rd shock.

rules.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Non-Shockable Rhythm Epi Timing
rules.deviation_message: First epinephrine delayed beyond 3 minutes in non-shockable rhythm (PEA/Asystole)
rules.recommendation: In PEA/asystole: administer epinephrine 1 mg IV/IO as soon as IV/IO access is established — target within 3 minutes.

rules.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Shock only for VF/pVT
rules.deviation_message: Shock delivered during non-shockable rhythm (PEA or asystole)
rules.recommendation: Defibrillation is ONLY indicated for VF and pulseless VT. Shock in PEA/asystole causes harm with no benefit.

rules.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS Algorithm — Antiarrhythmic After 3rd Shock
rules.deviation_message: Neither amiodarone nor lidocaine given after 3rd shock in refractory shockable rhythm
rules.recommendation: For VF/pVT refractory to ≥3 shocks: give amiodarone 300 mg IV/IO (then 150 mg) OR lidocaine 1-1.5 mg/kg as alternative.

rules.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS Algorithm — Hs and Ts
rules.deviation_message: Reversible causes (Hs and Ts) not discussed within 10 minutes of arrest
rules.recommendation: Identify and treat the 10 Hs and Ts within the first 10 minutes: Hypoxia, Hypovolemia, Hydrogen ion, Hypo/hyperkalemia, Hypothermia, Toxins, Tamponade, Tension pneumothorax, Thrombosis (coronary/pulmonary).
